hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env(\..*)?$'; then echo "[Hook] Blocked: reading env file $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 1; fi
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|css|scss|md)$' && ./node_modules/.bin/biome format --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
